steps.title: Expand and simplify both sides
steps.content:
Expand the left side:
$$4(2x+11)=8x+44$$
$$-2(2x-5)=-4x+10$$
Add them: $$8x+44-4x+10=4x+54$$
So the equation becomes $$4x+54=-9+13x$$.

steps.title: Isolate the variable term
steps.content:
Isolate x terms:
Subtract $4x$ from both sides: $$54=-9+9x$$
Add \$9$ to both sides: $$63=9x$$
Divide by \$9$: $$x=7$$.

steps.title: Compute 12x and select answer
steps.content:
Compute $12x$:
$$12x=12\times7=84$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
